sous_titres.text: I told you no smoking in this house.
That fucking car, it keeps dying on me all the time.
I need to call the mechanic.
That fucking mechanic... He's a thief! Don't call him.
We need to take the mattress out to wash it! Quickly!
We're going to lift him. Olmo, when Ana and I lift him, you take the mattress out.
No! no! no! Not on the floor! Please!
Don't leave me on the floor!
Don't leave me here on the floor!
Push it towards him, Ana, you're pushing it to the other side.
Olmo, pull down your dad's underwear.
Honey, this one, blue is your color.
How about a beer and a haircut?
We can make some enchiladas and beans, what do you think?
Hey, put that slice back, it's too much.
I have to go to work.
I need you to take care of your dad today.
I need you to do it again, I have to work.
Listen, Julio. I have to cover a double shift.
Could you take care of Néstor for a couple of hours?
You stay and take care of your father.
Olmo is taking care of you.
- It wasn't my fault. - He never listens.
I always have to call him at least four times for him to come.
Ana is the one who helps me.
If we don't pay by the end of the month, we're going to get evicted.
Why didn't you tell me before?
I'm telling you now, we're three months behind.
Don't call that mechanic, he's a thief,
I don't have time for that.
- I don't like frozen lasagna. - Don't eat the lasagna.
I like lasagna, but not the frozen kind.
I'm waiting for Aunt Licha to call.
Two amplifier modules working in stereophony.
Your mom used to stand in front of the window shop every time we walked by.
I bought it for her on our wedding anniversary, she couldn't be happier.
You both fell asleep on the sofa.
First, we need to know if the problem
comes from the transformers or from the transistors.
Do you know the difference between
a two-phase transformer and a three-phase one?
Because it has to do with the system of production and distribution of energy.
We're going to use the multimeter.
Look for a little black box with two wires. One red, one black.
Put the tip of the red wire on the right side of the transformer.
And the other one on the orange wire.
No! No! I said on the right side.
Oh! Well then on your left side.
So the problem has to do with the transistors.
First we need to disconnect the cathodes.
A cathode is the negative side of a diode.
And a diode is used to transform AC voltage to DC.
It's that black cylinder with the ring on top of it.
Now take the multimeter and measure the voltage.
That's not how you measure the voltage,
you have to use the right polarity.
I've told you a thousand times.
The red one goes on the positive side,
and the black one, on the negative side.
So it has to do with the oval transistor.
what's the best conductor to build a bridge between cathodes?
That's your problem, you don't want to learn.
If that bike works, it's because of me.
You only put oil on the wheels!
The best conductor to build a bridge between cathodes is aluminum.
Miguel, there should be a little piece in there.
I'm telling you negative, I told you a thousand times!
You only listen to what you want, you never pay attention.
I always tell you how to do things...
and you always do the opposite.
I just want you to learn!
I do get upset, but you keep messing up.
Don't worry, I'll take care of him.
This part is rusty. Well, where does your dad keep it?
You can't do that with this type of grill. These have to be kept inside.
I don't know what he told you,
Besides, you don't even know how to use it.
Your uncle is good at eating, not so great at cooking.
but you need to know how to do it.
He's just jealous because the only time he let me use it,
everyone said that this idiot, made the best burgers
they'd ever tasted in their fucking life.
Always making less of what people do.
I want to have barbecues in my backyard with my friends.
And you, with you, with my family.
It's good to know that I'm invited to your new house.
Well, so far, I haven't been.
I was waiting for you to be...
Over my dead body! Did you hear me?
I'm not asking you to watch it with me,
just move the antenna so I can watch the TV.
Remember, you gotta go up to the roof and move the antenna.
Flip me to my other side
What did I say about smoking?
Get that shit away from my face.
You're not only ruining your lungs, you're also ruining my rug.
You burnt it, I can see it from here.
Are you aware of the damage you're doing to your body?
I smoked until they proved how much harm it can cause!
How many cigarettes do you smoke a day?
How many cigarettes do you smoke a day?
When I get out of this bed, I'm gonna make you quit that filthy habit.
Oh, yeah? When you get out of that bed, I'll be waiting for you.
No wonder people stay away from you.
Where should we put the stereo?
They're looking for Manuel Sandoval's daughter.
Any friend of Obdulio is a friend of mine.
And now, our dear friend's favorite song.
Have more respect for the dead!
What the hell is wrong with you?
The neighbor called, he said your dad was screaming in pain...
I can't believe you left your dad by himself!
You were supposed to take care of him.
Well you're not a little kid anymore, Olmo.
And to top it off, you left the oven on.
It doesn't matter whose turn it was, I needed help!
You're selfish, you're selfish, you both are.
I'm not sleeping with him, and I don't have to explain myself to you.
Do you know why we named you Olmo?
Elm wood is very resistant to water.
Ships used to be built from elm wood.
I'm afraid of the water, but that doesn't mean I don't like it.
No, in fact, he gifted it to me on our wedding anniversary.
What were you doing with the stereo?
I don't know how we're going to pay the rent.
Wait, I'm going to open up from the inside.
Let me move his feet, like that.
Make sure you close the window.
